name: Hawiian Delight Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a 9 x 13 cake pan.
2. Combine the cake ingredients (flour, eggs, sugar, baking soda, walnuts, coconut, and crushed pineapple) in a large bowl until moist. The mixture will be thick.
3. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
4. Bake at 300°F for 45-55 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
6. For the frosting, beat together butter, cream cheese, powdered sugar, and vanilla in a bowl until smooth.
7. Spread the frosting evenly over the top of the cooled cake.
